    Publications & Reports

    Local Data Spaces: Leveraging trusted research environments for secure location-based policy research in the age of COVID-19

    Macdonald, Jacob L., Mark A. Green, Maurizio Gibin, Simon Leech, Alex Singleton, and Paul Longely. (2023). "Local Data Spaces: Leveraging trusted research environments for secure location-based policy research in the age of COVID-19." Data & Policy

    An open source delineation and hierarchical classification of UK retail agglomerations

    Macdonald, Jacob L., Les Dolega, and Alex Singleton. (2022). "An open source delineation and hierarchical classification of UK retail agglomerations." Scientific Data

    Integrating the Who, What, and Where of U.S. Retail Center Geographies

    Ballantyne, Patrick, Les Dolega, Alex Singleton and Jacob L. Macdonald. (2022). "Integrating the Who, What, and Where of U.S. Retail Center Geographies." Annals of the American Association of Geographers

    The impact of a change in the maximum park home sale commission

    Dunning, R., Gu, Y., Lord, A., Moore, T., Macdonald, J., Wilson, I. (2022). "An open source delineation and hierarchical classification of UK retail agglomerations." UK Dept. for Levelling Up, Housing & Communities - Report

    Decomposing the Temporal Signature of Nitrogen Dioxide Declines during the COVID-19 Pandemic in UK Urban Areas

    Calafiore, Alessia, Jacob L. Macdonald, and Alex Singleton. (2022). "Decomposing the Temporal Signature of Nitrogen Dioxide Declines during the COVID-19 Pandemic in UK Urban Areas." Applied Spatial Analysis and Policy

    Workshop on mobility data in urban science - Report (27-28 Oct.)

    Rowe, Francisco, Daniel Arribas-Bel, Alessia Calafiore, Martin Fleischmann, Krasen Samardzhiev, and Jacob L. Macdonald. (2021). "Workshop on mobility data in urban science - Report (27-28 Oct.); Alan Turing Workshop - Report

    Surface vs. groundwater: The effect of forest cover on the costs of drinking water

    Lopes, Ana-Faria, Jacob L. Macdonald, Paula Quinteiro, Luis Arroja, Claudia Carvalho-Santos, Maria A. Cunha-e-Sa, and Ana Claudia Dias. (2019). "Surface vs. groundwater: The effect of forest cover on the costs of drinking water." Water Resources and Economics

    Measurement and valuation of urban greenness: Remote sensing and hedonic applications to Lisbon, Portugal

    Franco, Sofia F., and Jacob L. Macdonald. (2018). "Measurement and valuation of urban greenness: Remote sensing and hedonic applications to Lisbon, Portugal." Regional Science and Urban Economics

    The effects of cultural heritage on residential property values: Evidence from Lisbon, Portugal

    Franco, Sofia F., and Jacob L. Macdonald. (2018). "The effects of cultural heritage on residential property values: Evidence from Lisbon, Portugal." Regional Science and Urban Economics

    Identifying Employment Subcenters: The Method of Exponentially Declining Cutoffs

    Ban, Jifei, Richard Arnott, and Jacob L. Macdonald. (2017). "Identifying Employment Subcenters: The Method of Exponentially Declining Cutoffs." Land

        ‘Conference Proceedings‘

    Exploring the Form and Function of Employment Subcentres in London, England

    Macdonald, Jacob L., and Pranjal Dave. (2022). "Exploring the Form and Function of Employment Subcentres in London, England." GISRUK Conference - Liverpool

    Local Data Spaces for Local Policy: Leveraging Trusted Research Environments for Granular and Secure Research in the Age of Covid-19

    Macdonald, Jacob L., Mark Green, Maurizio Gibin, Simon Leech, Alex Singleton, and Paul Longely. (2021). "Local Data Spaces for Local Policy: Leveraging Trusted Research Environments for Granular and Secure Research in the Age of Covid-19." Data for Policy Conference

    American Retail Centre Geographies: Centres, Characteristics & Catchments

    Ballantyne, Patrick, Alex Singleton, Les Dolega, and Jacob L. Macdonald. (2021). "American Retail Centre Geographies: Centres, Characteristics & Catchments" American Association of Geographers (AAG) Annual Meeting

    Urban Transport Initiatives and Pollution Patterns: Comparing Low Emission Zones and Metro Expansions via a Spatial-Temporal Difference-in-Difference

    Macdonald, Jacob L. (2020). "Urban Transport Initiatives and Pollution Patterns: Comparing Low Emission Zones and Metro Expansions via a Spatial-Temporal Difference-in-Difference." Monte Verita Conference on Sustainable Resource Use and Economic Dynamics (SURED)

    Neighbourhood Housing Price Dynamics of London, England: Clustering Spatio-Temporal Hotspots and Persistence

    Macdonald, Jacob L., Daniel Arribas-Bel, and Alex Singleton. (2020). "Neighbourhood Housing Price Dynamics of London, England: Clustering Spatio-Temporal Hotspots and Persistence." Urban Displacement Project and Urban Housing Lab Symposium on Neighborhood Change

    The Capitalization of Geohazard Risks on Residential Real Estate: Applications to Lisbon, Portugal

    Franco, Sofia F., and Jacob L. Macdonald. (2018). "The Capitalization of Geohazard Risks on Residential Real Estate: Applications to Lisbon, Portugal" VIII Conference of the Spanish-Portuguese Association of Natural Resource and Environment Economics

    Tree canopies, urban green amenities and the residential real estate market: Remote sensing and spatial hedonic applications to Lisbon, Portugal

    Franco, Sofia F., and Jacob L. Macdonald. (2016). "Tree canopies, urban green amenities and the residential real estate market: Remote sensing and spatial hedonic applications to Lisbon, Portugal" 11th Meeting of the Urban Economics Association
